project_type: TypeScript monorepo - Quant Ecosystem with multiple apps and shared packages
build_system: pnpm 10.28.1 with Turborepo. Workspaces: apps/*, packages/*, services/*
test_framework: Vitest v2 with co-located test files in __tests__/ directories
verification_instructions: 1. Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run in apps/quantmail to run all tests. 2. Run pnpm turbo typecheck to verify TypeScript. The vitest.config.ts in quantmail currently includes pattern 'api-v2/**/__tests__/**/*.test.ts' which needs updating to include backend tests.
setup_instructions: pnpm install in root. Node >=22.0.0 required.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install from npm registries. No Docker daemon guaranteed.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits: feat(quantmail): ... TypeScript strict, no any, Zod validation. crypto.randomBytes/randomUUID for security paths. Every new service file gets .test.ts.

key_patterns.ai_engine: @quant/ai exports AIEngine class with infer() method accepting AIInferenceRequest. Returns AIInferenceResponse with content string.
key_patterns.service_pattern: Services are classes that take dependencies via constructor. See apps/quantmail/backend/services/ai-email.service.ts for existing pattern.
key_patterns.test_pattern: Tests in __tests__/ dir use vi.fn() mocks for external deps, describe/it blocks. See backend/__tests__/ai-email.service.test.ts.
key_patterns.route_pattern: Fastify plugin functions with typed params. Zod schemas for validation. See backend/routes/ai.ts.
key_patterns.queue_pattern: @quant/queue TypedQueue class with add(jobName, payload, opts) where opts can include delay for delayed jobs.

directory_structure: apps/quantmail/backend/ has: app.ts (Fastify entry), routes/ (Fastify route plugins), services/ (business logic classes), __tests__/ (vitest tests). packages/ai/ has the AIEngine and MailAIService. packages/queue/ has TypedQueue with BullMQ. packages/common/ has shared types and utils.
